overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a character walking through a sunlit dystopian industrial district. The character navigates urban streets, crosses intersections, passes under metal walkways and graffiti-covered alleys, and walks alongside large industrial storage tanks.

scene_state.functional_zone: urban sidewalk approaching intersection with industrial buildings

events.description: blue pickup truck drives across the intersection from right to left
character steps off curb to cross the asphalt street

agents.ego_description: walking along sidewalk past mural wall, then crossing the street at intersection

notable_agents.action: blue pickup truck driving across the intersection ahead of the character

entered.detail: concrete wall with large purple and pink graffiti mural
tall brown building with orange trim and dark tinted windows
tall cylindrical industrial tower with pinkish hue in the distance
elevated highway or monorail structure spanning across the street

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a sunlit sidewalk next to a building with a colorful mural, approaching an urban intersection. A blue pickup truck crosses the intersection as the character steps off the curb to cross the street, with a large brown office building and industrial tower visible in the background.

scene_state.functional_zone: industrial corridor with overhead metal walkways

events.description: entering covered area beneath metal walkway bridges with graffiti-covered walls

agents.ego_description: walking steadily under the overhead metal walkways in the industrial alley

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in light colored clothing walking ahead under the walkways

entered.detail: rusted metal industrial walkway spanning overhead with red warning lights underneath
concrete wall covered in colorful graffiti tags and street art

segments.scene_description: The character enters an industrial corridor beneath metal walkway bridges that cast striped shadows on the ground. The left wall is covered in graffiti while the brown office building remains visible on the right. The lighting becomes slightly diffused under the overhead structures.

scene_state.functional_zone: graffiti-covered alley with pedestrians and street artists

events.description: character passes an overweight pedestrian walking in the opposite direction
encountering two individuals spray painting green NO FUTURE graffiti on a metal shutter

agents.ego_description: walking past various pedestrians including a person in yellow pants and graffiti artists painting a wall

notable_agents.action: overweight person in white tank top and yellow pants walking toward the camera
person spray painting green NO FUTURE text on the metal shutter wall

entered.detail: massive rusted industrial storage tank with metal railing around the base
fresh green spray-painted text reading NO FUTURE on corrugated metal shutter

segments.scene_description: The character continues through a narrow alley with extensive graffiti coverage, passing under the final overhead walkway. An overweight pedestrian in yellow pants walks past in the opposite direction. The character then passes two individuals creating a green NO FUTURE graffiti piece, with a large cylindrical industrial tank becoming visible in the distance.

scene_state.functional_zone: industrial tank farm with barbed wire fencing and power infrastructure

events.description: exiting the narrow alley into open area with large industrial storage tanks

agents.ego_description: walking alongside large industrial tanks and approaching an intersection with power lines and transmission towers

entered.detail: chain link fence with coiled barbed wire topping running alongside the sidewalk
derelict green car with rust and damage parked near the tank
tall metal electrical transmission tower with multiple power lines
large empty billboard structure with metal framework

segments.scene_description: The character emerges from the narrow alley into a wide-open industrial area dominated by massive cylindrical storage tanks surrounded by barbed wire fencing. An abandoned car sits near the fence. The character walks past the tanks toward an intersection, with electrical transmission towers and empty billboards visible against the clear sky.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a bright urban street into a claustrophobic graffiti-lined corridor that eventually opens into a vast industrial wasteland. It begins on a sunlit sidewalk beside a colorful mural, following the character as they cross an intersection past a blue pickup truck and toward a distant industrial tower. As the character moves forward, the scene shifts into a shaded industrial corridor where metal walkway bridges cast striped shadows across the ground and graffiti-covered walls close in. The camera then navigates a narrow alley, passing a pedestrian in yellow pants and artists painting a green mural, before the path clears as the character emerges from the overhead structures. Finally, the environment expands into a wide-open area dominated by massive cylindrical storage tanks and barbed wire fencing, with electrical towers and empty billboards standing against a clear sky.
